properties:
insert into 교수 (professor_id, professor_name, professor_no, professor_address, professor_email, professor_phone, professor_pw) where (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
select * from 학생
SELECT student_id, student_name FROM 학생 WHERE student_id = ? AND student_pw = ?
SELECT professor_id, professor_name FROM 교수 WHERE professor_id = ? AND professor_pw = ?
-- 학생 기능
select * from 학생
select c.class_no, c.class_name, c.class_time, c.class_type, c.class_room, c.class_point, pr.professor_name from 강의 c join 교수 pr on c.professor_id = pr.professor_id
insert into 수강 (student_id, class_no) values (?, ?);
select en.student_id, st.student_name, en.class_no, c.class_name, c.class_time, c.class_type, c.class_room, pr.professor_name, en.enroll_date from 수강 en join 학생 st on en.student_id = st.student_id join 강의 c on en.class_no = c.class_no join 교수 pr on c.professor_id = pr.professor_id where en.student_id = ? order by class_no asc
delete from 수강 where student_id = ? and class_no = ?
select c.class_task, c.class_name from 강의 c join 수강 en on c.class_no = en.class_no where en.student_id = ? and c.class_no = ?
select en.score, c.course_name from 수강 en join 강의 c on en.course_id = c.course_id where en.student_id = ? and en.course_id = ?
